usersPageDescription: List, filter and create users from the first real identity workspace screen.
usersListSubtitle: Search, paging and row actions come from the shared table standard.
createUserSubtitle: The first real CRUD card powered by the form engine.
userSearchPlaceholder: Search by code, username or email
noUsersDescription: Adjust filters or create a new user.
notifyAdminHelp: When enabled, the related admin receives a creation mail.
userDetailSubtitle: Inspect and update the selected user in the same page.
sessionsPageDescription: Filter, inspect and revoke user sessions.
sessionsListSubtitle: Session monitor is one of the first real operational identity screens.
sessionDetailSubtitle: Apply revoke operation for the selected session.
sessionDetailEmptyDescription: Pick one record from the list to see detail and revoke flow.
onlyActiveSessionsHelp: When disabled, revoked sessions are also included.
noSessionsDescription: Change filters to inspect other users.
passwordPolicyPageDescription: Manage runtime policy snapshot and preview from one screen.
passwordPolicySnapshotSubtitle: Run previews on top of the current password policy.
passwordPolicyPreviewSubtitle: Inspect configuration impact and sample password results.
passwordPolicyPreviewEmptyDescription: The preview result will appear here after execution.
editUserSubtitle: Update basic info. Password and role changes are handled on separate screens.
userRolesSubtitle: Assign or remove roles for this user.
assignedRolesSubtitle: Roles currently active for this user.
availableRolesSubtitle: Roles in the system not yet assigned.
noRolesDescription: Assign a role from the right panel.
allRolesAssignedDescription: No more roles available to assign.
userPermissionsSubtitle: View, add or remove T-Code based action permissions.
permissionListSubtitle: Registered action permissions for this user.
addPermissionSubtitle: Select T-Code and action to add or update a permission.
noPermissionsDescription: Add the first permission using the form on the right.
transactionCodeHelp: e.g. SYS01, MAT02. Must not be empty.
isAllowedHelp: If off, access will be denied for this action.
deleteConfirm: This user will be permanently deleted. Continue?
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
generalInfoDesc: User basic identity and contact details.
mustChangePasswordHelp: If enabled, the user must change their password on next login.
